      • 少しも～ない

        すこしも～ない

        Not even a little, Not at all, Not in the least, Never

        15: 22/23

      • ～少なくない

        ～すくなくない

        Quite a lot, Many, Not a few

        15: 23/23

      • ～場合は

        ～ばあいは

        In the event of, In the case of

        16: 1/16

      • Verb[て] (Casual request)

        Please do for me

        16: 2/16

      • ～てよかった

        I'm glad that

        16: 3/16

      • Verb[せる・させる]

        Verb　(Causative)

        To make/let/have (somebody do something)

        16: 4/16

      • ～といってもいい

        You could say, You might say

        16: 5/16

      • ～ても

        ～ても・～でも

        Even if, Even though

        16: 6/16

      • てしまう・ちゃう

        To do something by accident, To finish completely, Unfortunately

        16: 7/16

      • Verb[て] (Reasons and Causes)

        And so, Due to, Because of, Since

        16: 8/16

      • Verb[させられる]

        Verb (Causative-Passive)

        To be made to do something, To be forced to do

        16: 9/16

      • て・で (Means and Manner)

        Verb[て]・Noun + で

        By, With, On, By means of, ～ing with

        16: 10/16

      • ～てある

        Transitive Verb［て］ + ある

        Something is done, Has been done, (Remaining in state)

        16: 11/16

      • ～ ㋐ ように ㋑ て欲しい

        ～ように + Verb［て］ + ほしい

        Want ～ to ㋑ like ㋐,
        Want ～ to ㋑ in the way of ㋐

        16: 12/16

      • ～ている間に

        Verb[ている] +あいだに

        While, During the time that ～

        16: 13/16

      • ～なくてもいい

        Verb[なくて] + もいい

        Don't have to

        16: 14/16

      • ～てみる

        Verb[て] + みる

        To try to

        16: 15/16

      • ～てすみません

        Verb[て] + すみません

        I'm sorry for...

        16: 16/16

      • ～てあげる

        Verb[て] + あげる

        To do something for someone, As a favor for

        17: 1/18

      • ～てくれる

        Verb[て] + くれる

        Does ～ for me, To do something for us

        17: 2/18

      • ～てもらう

        Verb[て] + もらう

        To get someone to do, To have someone do

        17: 3/18

      • ～なさい

        Verb[stem] + なさい

        Command to do

        17: 4/18

      • Verb[て] (Non-Sequence)

        And, But, (Parallel action/state)

        17: 5/18

      • Verb[ないで]

        Verb (Casual Request)

        (Please) do not (for me)

        17: 6/18

      • ～てくれてありがとう

        Verb[て] + くれてありがとう

        Thank you for ～ ing

        17: 7/18

      • ～てくれない

        Verb[て] + くれない・もらえない

        Would you?, Could you?

        17: 8/18

      • ～のだろうか

        I wonder…

        17: 9/18

      • お～になる 🌸

        お + Verb[stem] + になる

        To do (Honorific)

        17: 10/18

      • ～なさる 🌸

        Verb［stem］+ なさる

        To do (Honorific)

        17: 11/18

      • お～ください 🌸

        お + Verb[stem] + ください

        Please do (Honorific)

        17: 12/18

      • いらっしゃる 🌸

        To be (Honorific), To come (Honorific), To go (Honorific)

        17: 13/18

      • ございます 🌸

        ございます

        To be, To exist (Polite)

        17: 14/18

      • でございます 🌸

        でございます

        To be, Polite copula

        17: 15/18

      • お～する 🌸

        [お/ご] + Verb［stem］+ する

        I humbly do, I am obliged to do, Humble speech

        17: 16/18

      • いたす 🌸

        いたす

        To do (Humble), To venerably do

        17: 17/18

      • ～ていただけませんか 🌸

        Verb［て］ + いただけませんか

        Won't you, Could you please (Humble request)

        17: 18/18

      • ～たら

        When, If, After

        18: 1/18

      • 他に(も)・他(に)は

        ほかに

        Other, Another, Any other, Anything else, As well as, Besides, In addition

        18: 2/18

      • ～が必要

        ～がひつよう

        Need, Necessary

        18: 3/18

      • そんなに

        So (much), That much, Like that

        18: 4/18

      • ～必要がある

        Verb + ひつようがある

        It is necessary to do, Need to do

        18: 5/18

      • 例えば

        たとえば

        For example

        18: 6/18

      • Verb[れる・られる]

        Verb (Potential)

        To be able, Can

        18: 7/18

      • ～んだけど・～んですが

        But…, And… (Explanatory)

        18: 8/18

      • ～はずだ

        Be expected to do, Supposed to, Should do

        18: 9/18

      • ～かどうか

        Whether or not, If… or not

        18: 10/18

      • ～と　(Conditional)

        If, When, Whenever, And

        18: 11/18

      • ～ないと

        Verb[ない] + と

        Must, Have to

        18: 12/18

      • ～はずがない

        Hardly possible, Cannot be, Highly unlikely, Improbable

        18: 13/18

      • Noun + しか + Verb[ない]

        Noun + しか + Verb[ない]

        There's only, Nothing but [Noun] does [Verb]

        18: 14/18

      • ～だけでなく

        Not only… but also

        18: 15/18

      • ～(こと)ができる

        [Verb + こと/Noun] + が + できる

        Can, Be able to

        18: 16/18

        Question marker (Masculine)

        18: 17/18

      • もし

        If (For emphasis)

        18: 18/18

      • ～し (Reasons)

        And, Because, (Listing reasons)

        19: 1/16

      • ～[で/から]できる

        Made of, Made from

        19: 2/16

      • ～ながら

        Verb[stem] + ながら

        While ～ing, During, As

        19: 3/16

      • ～たところだ

        Verb[た] + ところだ

        Just finished doing, Was just doing

        19: 4/16

        In the process of doing ～ right now/at this moment

        19: 5/16

      • ㋐ と ㋑ と、どちらが

        Between ㋐ and ㋑, which one…

        19: 6/16

      • ～ようにする

        To try to, To make sure to, To endeavor to

        19: 7/16

      • ～なければいけない

        Must do, Have to do

        19: 8/16

      • ～なければならない

        19: 9/16

        To continue doing [Verb]

        19: 10/16

      • ～ように言う

        ～ようにいう

        To tell, request, or order to do (in such a way)

        19: 11/16

      • ～予定だ

        ～よていだ

        Plan to, Intend to

        19: 12/16

      • ～ように(祈る)

        ～ように(いのる)

        Pray that/for, Hope that/for, Keep fingers crossed that

        19: 13/16

      • ～たばかり

        Verb[た] + ばかり

        Just did, Something just happened

        19: 14/16

        -ification, -ization, To become, Transform into

        19: 15/16

        So that, In order to, In such a way that

        20: 1/19

      • ～かしら

        I wonder

        20: 2/19

        typical of, -ish, like, appropriate for, befitting
